<!--
Thank you for signing the Paris Initiative.

Title format:  Sign: <Your Name or Organization> (<Affiliation>)

Please confirm the items below by replacing [ ] with [x].
-->

## Signature submission

- [ ] I have read [the Paris Initiative](../README.md) in full and I publicly endorse the four principles and the next steps.
- [ ] My change to `SIGNATORIES.md` follows the required format:
      `- **Name** — *Affiliation (optional)* — [optional URL]`
- [ ] I have added my entry to **only one** of the two sections (Organizations or Individuals) and only **one new line**.
- [ ] The affiliation and URL (if provided) are accurate and I am authorised to use them.
- [ ] I understand my entry will be public and reproduced under CC BY 4.0.

## About me / my organization

<!-- A short sentence is helpful but not required. -->
